title: A Little Root Trouble
start_lines: Marigold? I am Sage. I keep the plant shop, mostly upright.
I hope I am not interrupting your first morning in the shop.
I have a tray of young roots that will not wake after being moved.
I know plants, but this feels like it wants a gentler sort of magic.
Could you make a Root-Wake Tonic for them?
reminder_lines: No hurry. The roots are sleeping stubbornly, but not dangerously.
Dewcap mushroom and glowberries should wake them gently.
complete_lines: That is exactly it. Soft magic, not too sharp.
Thank you, Marigold. You may have a good hand for green things.
Please take this seed packet, and a little gold for your time.

title: A Brighter Menu
start_lines: Marigold, yes? Camellia. I run the restaurant in town.
Sage mentioned your Root-Wake Tonic did exactly what it promised.
I am looking for something bright for the lunch menu. Gentle, not too sweet.
Could you brew a Glowberry Cordial for me?
reminder_lines: The cordial should be bright without shouting.
Moonleaf, glowberries, and forest water should keep it balanced.
complete_lines: There it is. Bright, clean, and kinder than the usual tavern punch.
This will do nicely. Thank you, Marigold.
Take this for the trouble. Keep the recipe; I suspect I will ask for it again.

title: A Cordial Delivery
board_unavailable_lines: The Mapleton notices are pinned neatly, but nothing here needs Marigold today.
board_start_lines: Request: two bottles of Glowberry Cordial for Camellia at the restaurant stall.
Please deliver them in person before the lunch rush.
board_active_lines: Camellia still needs Glowberry Cordial x2 delivered to the restaurant stall.
board_completed_lines: Camellia's cordial request has a small satisfied check mark beside it.
not_started_lines: I left a small note on the notice board, if you are taking town requests.
reminder_lines: Two Glowberry Cordials should be enough for the lunch special.
Bring them here when they are ready, please.
complete_lines: Perfect timing. The noon regulars have been asking what smelled so bright.
Two bottles will let me test the special properly.
Thank you, Marigold. Please take this for the delivery.
post_complete_lines: The cordial has already earned a few approving nods. That is high praise before lunch.

title: A Gentle Restock
board_unavailable_lines: The Mapleton notices are pinned neatly, but nothing here needs Marigold today.
board_start_lines: Request: one Root-Wake Tonic for Sage's seedling shelf.
Please deliver it to the plant stall when it is ready.
board_active_lines: Sage still needs one Root-Wake Tonic delivered to the plant stall.
board_completed_lines: Sage's restock request has a tidy check mark beside it.
not_started_lines: I pinned a small restock note to the board, if you are taking town errands.
reminder_lines: One Root-Wake Tonic should be enough for this shelf.
The seedlings are not in danger. They are simply taking their time.
complete_lines: Ah, there it is. The seedlings will appreciate the gentleness.
Thank you, Marigold. A careful tonic is better than a loud one.
Please take this for the trouble.
post_complete_lines: The seedlings have perked up without becoming dramatic. That is ideal.
